<Meta title="api/useEditorPlugin" />
<DocsHeader title="useEditorPlugin" breadCrumbs="API reference » useEditorPlugin" type="Hook">
  [Parameters](#parameters) · [Returns](#returns)
</DocsHeader>

Add a plugin to an editor instance

```tsx
import { useEditor, useEditorPlugin } from '@sagold/react-json-editor';

function WebFormComponent() {
  const editor = useEditor(options)
  useEditorPlugin(editor, plugin);

  // ...
```

## Parameters

### `editor`

to add plugin to. Skips adding plugin if editor is empty
### `plugin: T`

plugin to add
### `options`

plugin options to pass to addPlugin

## Returns

**`ReturnType<T> | undefined`** plugin instance used by editor
